zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Moulton I of Gilsland於大約1226年出生時，他的父親Thomas de Multon II62歲，母親Ada de Morville43歲。他於1240年與Maude de Vaux在英國英格蘭波藍德易爾頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1271年1月14日之前在英國諾圖波藍德吉爾曼德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Moulton I of Gilsland于大约1226年出生时，他的父亲Thomas de Multon II62岁，母亲Ada de Morville43岁。他于1240年与Maude de Vaux在英国英格兰波藍德易爾頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1271年1月14日之前在英国諾圖波藍德吉爾曼德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Moulton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Cheshire and Lancashire): habitational name from one or more of the places called Moulton (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, North Yorkshire), most of which are named with the Old English personal name Mūl(a), the Old Norse personal name Múli, or Old English mūl ‘mule’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Molden
meanings: metronymic from the Middle English female personal name Mold, a form of Maud, with the characteristically West Midland genitival suffix -en.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Moulton I of Gilsland was born about 1226, his father, Thomas de Multon II, was 62 and his mother, Ada de Morville, was 43. He married Maude de Vaux in 1240, in Irthington, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died before 14 January 1271, in Gilsland, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Moulton I of Gilsland est né environ 1226, son père, Thomas de Multon II, avait 62 ans et sa mère, Ada de Morville, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Maude de Vaux en 1240, à Irthington, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 14 janvier 1271, à Gilsland, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Moulton I of Gilsland um 1226 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Multon II 62 und seine Mutter Ada de Morville 43. Er hat 1240 in Irthington, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom Maude de Vaux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 14. Januar 1271 in Gilsland, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Moulton I of Gilsland è nato il circa 1226, il suo padre, Thomas de Multon II, aveva 62 anni e il suo madre, Ada de Morville, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Maude de Vaux nel 1240, nel Irthington, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 14 gennaio 1271, nel Gilsland, Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Moulton I of Gilslandが約1226年に生まれた時，父Thomas de Multon IIは62歳，母Ada de Morvilleは43歳であった。1240年にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドイルスイントンでMaude de Vauxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1271年1月14日以前にイギリスノースウンバーランドギルスランドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Moulton I of Gilsland(이)가 대략 1226년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Multon II(은)는 62세였고, 그의 어머니 Ada de Morville(은)는 43세였다. 그는 1240년 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 이르스잉턴에서 Maude de Vaux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1271년 1월 14일 이전 영국 노르스벌랜드 길슬랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Moulton I of Gilsland nasceu aproximadamente 1226, seu pai, Thomas de Multon II, tinha 62 anos e sua mãe, Ada de Morville, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Maude de Vaux em 1240, em Irthington, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 14 de janeiro de 1271, em Gilsland, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Moulton I of Gilsland родился около 1226 г., его отцу по имени Thomas de Multon II было 62 года, а матери, которую звали Ada de Morville, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Maude de Vaux в 1240 г. в местности иртингтон, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 14 январь 1271 г. в местности джилсланд, нортумбирланд, Англия.

Se casó con Maude de Vaux en 1240, en Irthington, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió antes de 14 de enero de 1271, en Gilsland, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
